prompt: Ultra-photorealistic cinematic fashion editorial featuring Cristiano Ronaldo, preserving his recognizable facial features, athletic muscular physique, sharp haircut and confident presence. He wears black rectangular luxury sunglasses and a retro-inspired deep burgundy Portugal football jersey with dark green collar and sleeve trim, subtle tonal fabric pattern, fine gold piping, Portugal crest and gold number 7, paired with relaxed dark green wide-leg trousers, premium white sneakers with green stripes, and a luxury wristwatch. Create a two-shot campaign series with strong visual consistency. Shot 1: dramatic ultra-wide low-angle city portrait on a modern skyscraper plaza under a clear blue sky; Cristiano Ronaldo crouches close to the camera with one knee raised, extending one open hand dramatically toward the lens, exaggerated perspective and slight fisheye distortion making the hand appear larger, towering glass skyscrapers converging around him, hard midday sunlight, crisp architectural shadows, bold sports-fashion energy. Shot 2: luxury indoor portrait in a dark burgundy football heritage lounge with rich wood wall panels, thin gold detailing, trophy displays and a deep leather sofa; Cristiano Ronaldo stands confidently with both hands in his trouser pockets, body slightly angled, looking off-camera, warm directional studio lighting sculpting his face and arms, sophisticated premium campaign atmosphere. High-end football fashion campaign, realistic skin pores and fabric texture, accurate anatomy and hands, sharp jersey details, dramatic editorial composition, Leica photography, 24mm wide-angle lens for outdoor shot, 50mm lens for indoor portrait, HDR, cinematic color grading, ultra-detailed, 8K, no watermark, vertical 4:5.
promptEn: Ultra-photorealistic cinematic fashion editorial featuring Cristiano Ronaldo, preserving his recognizable facial features, athletic muscular physique, sharp haircut and confident presence. He wears black rectangular luxury sunglasses and a retro-inspired deep burgundy Portugal football jersey with dark green collar and sleeve trim, subtle tonal fabric pattern, fine gold piping, Portugal crest and gold number 7, paired with relaxed dark green wide-leg trousers, premium white sneakers with green stripes, and a luxury wristwatch. Create a two-shot campaign series with strong visual consistency. Shot 2: luxury indoor portrait in a dark burgundy football heritage lounge with rich wood wall panels, thin gold detailing, trophy displays and a deep leather sofa; Cristiano Ronaldo stands confidently with both hands in his trouser pockets, body slightly angled, looking off-camera, warm directional studio lighting sculpting his face and arms, sophisticated premium campaign atmosphere. High-end football fashion campaign, realistic skin pores and fabric texture, accurate anatomy and hands, sharp jersey details, dramatic editorial composition, Leica photography, 24mm wide-angle lens for outdoor shot, 50mm lens for indoor portrait, HDR, cinematic color grading, ultra-detailed, 8K, no watermark, vertical 4:5.
promptZh: 超写实电影感时尚大片，主角为 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多，保留其标志性的面部特征、健硕的肌肉线条、利落的发型以及自信的气场。他佩戴黑色长方形奢华太阳镜，身着复古风格的深 酒红色 葡萄牙 国家队球衣，领口和袖口饰有深绿色镶边，面料带有精致的同色系暗纹，配有金色细滚边、葡萄牙队徽及金色 7 号字样；下身搭配宽松的深绿色阔腿裤，脚穿带有绿色条纹的高级白色运动鞋，并佩戴奢华腕表。创作一组具有强烈视觉连贯性的双镜头大片。镜头 1：在晴朗蓝天下的现代摩天大楼广场拍摄的戏剧性超广角低角度城市人像；克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多 单膝跪地靠近镜头，一只手向镜头方向戏剧性地伸出，夸张的透视效果和轻微的鱼眼畸变使手部显得更大，高耸的玻璃摩天大楼在他周围汇聚，强烈的正午阳光，清晰的建筑阴影，充满大胆的运动时尚活力。镜头 2：在深 酒红色 的足球文化休息室拍摄的奢华室内人像，背景为考究的木质墙板、纤细的金色装饰、奖杯陈列柜和深色真皮沙发；克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多 双手插兜自信站立，身体微微侧转，视线看向画外，温暖的定向摄影棚灯光勾勒出他的面部和手臂轮廓，营造出精致的高端广告氛围。高端足球时尚大片，真实的皮肤毛孔和织物纹理，精准的解剖结构和手部细节，清晰的球衣细节，戏剧性的编辑构图，徕卡摄影风格，室外镜头采用 24mm 广角镜头，室内人像采用 50mm 镜头，HDR，电影级调色，超精细，8K 分辨率，无水印，竖构图 4:5。
